title: Working Memory, Durable Memory, Write Admission, Provenance, and Poisoning Defense · Program Brief: Memory Write Admission
summary: The agent stores every conversation, mixes tenants, remembers injected instructions as facts, never expires data, and treats similarity as truth. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the memory write admission increment in provenance-gated tenant-isolated memory service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case…
objectives: Admit memory only for an allowed purpose with source, claim type, confidence, sensitivity, consent or authority, expiry, and contradiction policy.
Distinguish in-turn state, session memory, user preferences, task facts, organizational knowledge, examples, and audit records by owner and lifetime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example agent engineering team handles case 7997 during a controlled support-operations rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate working and durable memory, gate writes, preserve provenance, isolate tenants, expire data, and reject poisoning; every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Admit memory only for an allowed purpose with source, claim type, confidence, sensitivity, consent or authority, expiry, and contradiction policy. A defensible solution applies Memory Write Admission, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to provenance-gated tenant-isolated memory service.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-memory-policy-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-memory-policy-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_memory_policy_4(memory_candidates: int = 30, admitted_memories: int = 12, rejected_memories: int = 18, provenance_records: int = 30, cross_tenant_leaks: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if memory_candidates < 1 or admitted_memories < 0 or rejected_memories < 0:
        return False, memory_candidates, "memory-count"
    if admitted_memories + rejected_memories != memory_candidates:
        return False, admitted_memories, "memory-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != memory_candidates:
        return False, provenance_records, "memory-provenance"
    if cross_tenant_leaks > 0:
        return False, cross_tenant_leaks, "tenant-memory-leak"
    assert admitted_memories + rejected_memories == memory_candidates and cross_tenant_leaks == 0
    return True, admitted_memories, "provenance-gated-memory"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-memory-write-admission-1v4tyt
# Competency: agentpy-memory-write-admission.
# Case 4371: a clean package, canary, and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects.
def evidence_agentpy_memory_write_admission_1v4tyt(memory_candidates: int = 30, admitted_memories: int = 12, rejected_memories: int = 18, provenance_records: int = 30, cross_tenant_leaks: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1v4tyt = "1v4tyt-tyt4v1-4371"
    assert evidence_variant_1v4tyt
    evidence_axes_1v4tyt = (
        "authority1v4tyt",
        "interaction4371",
        "tooltyt4v1",
        "state1v4tyt4371",
        "evaluation43711v4tyt",
        "recoverytyt4v14371",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1v4tyt)) == 6
    if memory_candidates < 1 or admitted_memories < 0 or rejected_memories < 0:
        return False, memory_candidates, "memory-count"
    if admitted_memories + rejected_memories != memory_candidates:
        return False, admitted_memories, "memory-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != memory_candidates:
        return False, provenance_records, "memory-provenance"
    if cross_tenant_leaks > 0:
        return False, cross_tenant_leaks, "tenant-memory-leak"
    assert admitted_memories + rejected_memories == memory_candidates and cross_tenant_leaks == 0
    return True, admitted_memories, "provenance-gated-memory"
